description: Get dressed in these thong wedges from catwalk for a wonderful ethnic look. The white and gold straps lend a dose of festivity to your look, making this pair a must have in your wardrobe. Upper Synthetic thong style straps for a snug Fit White and gold layered strap design for added style Soft synthetic backing on the straps for all day comfort Midsole Synthetic leather covered footbed with stitch detailing and metallic panel for added style Outsole Wedge heels for better support TPU outsole with horizontal grooves on the forefoot and heel for extra grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
